title: lupinus pusillus var. rubens
intro: Lupinus pusillus var. rubens, also known as the dwarf lupine or lupine, is a variety of lupine, a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Lupinus pusillus var. rubens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lupinus pusillus var. rubens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
